name: Airtable Comment
description: A comment attached to an Airtable record. Comments support user mentions using the @[usrXXXXXXXX] syntax and are used for collaboration and discussion within records.

id.description: The unique identifier for the comment.

text.description: The text content of the comment. May include user mentions in the format @[usrXXXXXXXX].

author.description: The user who created the comment.

id.description: The unique identifier of the comment author (starts with 'usr').

email.description: The email address of the comment author.

name.description: The display name of the comment author.

createdTime.description: The time when the comment was created in ISO 8601 format.

lastUpdatedTime.description: The time when the comment was last updated. Null if the comment has not been edited.
